content:
CALL TRANSCRIPT
Customer: Castlepoint Media
Customer ID: C012
Contract ID: K012
Account Executive: James Okafor
Call Type: Onboarding Check-in
Date: October 18, 2023
Participants: James Okafor (AE), Diane Tran (Head of Marketing)

James Okafor: Diane, two months in. How is the editorial team using InsightIQ?

Diane Tran: The content performance dashboards are working well for the editorial team. They can see article performance without having to ask the data team for reports, which has been a positive change.

James Okafor: Great. Any requests coming from the team?

Diane Tran: One thing that's come up — we've been shifting more of our focus toward paid social campaigns and we need to track performance data from Facebook and Instagram. Does InsightIQ have native social media integrations?

James Okafor: We have API access that can pull in data from third-party sources, including social platforms. It requires some technical configuration on your end to set up.

Diane Tran: We don't really have technical resources to manage that. Our team is editorial and marketing — we're not developers.

James Okafor: That's a fair constraint. The native social integrations you're describing aren't in our current feature set — it's more of a content analytics focus than a social analytics focus. I want to be upfront about that rather than oversell what the API workaround can realistically deliver without technical support.

Diane Tran: I appreciate you being honest. We're only two months in so let's see how the editorial use case develops. But I want to flag that if our focus continues to shift toward social, we may need to evaluate other options.

James Okafor: Understood. I'll note it on our end and keep you informed if any social integration capabilities come onto the roadmap.
